'''Locru''' was the original owner of [[Locru's Central Saloon]] in [[Tun Aduban]] on [[Aduba-3/Legends|Aduba-3]].<ref name="wtcm1" />

When he died, his body was buried in one of the first plots in [[Spacer's Hill]].<ref name="wtcm1" />
